/**
/**

(Current) 타워를 추가해줘, - 3월 27, 6:52 PM
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="ko">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Xenotactic Grid Defense - Standalone</title>
    <script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>
    <script type="importmap">
      {
        "imports": {
          "@google/genai": "https://esm.run/@google/genai"
        }
      }
    </script>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;700;900&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <style>
        body { font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; background-color: #0a0a0a; color: white; overflow-x: hidden; }
        .font-mono { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; }
        canvas { image-rendering: pixelated; }
        .glass { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05); backdrop-filter: blur(10px); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); }
        .neon-green { box-shadow: 0 0 15px rgba(74, 222, 128, 0.4); }
        @keyframes pulse-red { 0%, 100% { opacity: 1; } 50% { opacity: 0.5; } }
        .animate-pulse-red { animation: pulse-red 2s infinite; }
    </style>
</head>
<body class="min-h-screen flex flex-col">
    <!-- Header -->
    <header class="border-b border-white/10 bg-black/50 backdrop-blur-md sticky top-0 z-50">
        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 h-16 flex items-center justify-between">
            <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
                <div class="w-10 h-10 bg-green-500 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(34,197,94,0.3)]">
                    <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="black" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M12 22s8-4 8-10V5l-8-3-8 3v7c0 6 8 10 8 10"/></svg>
                </div>
                <div>
                    <h1 class="text-lg font-bold tracking-tight uppercase italic">Xenotactic</h1>
                    <p class="text-[10px] text-white/40 uppercase tracking-[0.2em] -mt-1">Standalone Protocol</p>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="flex items-center gap-8">
                <div class="flex items-center gap-2">
                    <svg class="w-4 h-4 text-yellow-400" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="8" cy="8" r="6"/><path d="M18.09 10.37A6 6 0 1 1 10.34 18.06"/><path d="M7 6h1v4"/><path d="m16.71 13.88.7.71-2.82 2.82"/></svg>
                    <span id="money-display" class="font-mono text-xl font-bold tracking-tighter">100</span>
                </div>
                <div class="flex items-center gap-2">
                    <svg class="w-4 h-4 text-red-500" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="9" cy="12" r="1"/><circle cx="15" cy="12" r="1"/><path d="M8 20a6 6 0 0 1 8 0"/><path d="m15 18-.7.7"/><path d="M6 15h12"/><path d="M13 12v.01"/><path d="M11 12v.01"/></svg>
                    <span id="lives-display" class="font-mono text-xl font-bold tracking-tighter">20</span>
                </div>
                <div class="flex items-center gap-2">
                    <svg class="w-4 h-4 text-blue-400" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="m13 2-2 2.5h3L12 7"/><path d="M11 14h6"/><path d="M11 18h6"/><path d="M15 6h1a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v11a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H8a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V8a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h1"/></svg>
                    <span id="wave-display" class="font-mono text-xl font-bold tracking-tighter">WAVE 0</span>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
                <button id="generate-sprites-btn" class="flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 rounded-xl bg-blue-500/10 hover:bg-blue-500/20 border border-blue-500/20 transition-all text-blue-400 group" title="AI를 사용하여 타워 이미지를 생성합니다">
                    <svg id="gen-icon" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform"><rect width="18" height="18" x="3" y="3" rx="2" ry="2"/><circle cx="9" cy="9" r="2"/><path d="m21 15-3.086-3.086a2 2 0 0 0-2.828 0L6 21"/></svg>
                    <div class="text-left hidden sm:block">
                        <p class="text-[9px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider opacity-60 leading-none">AI Generator</p>
                        <p class="text-xs font-bold text-white/90">AI 타워 생성</p>
                    </div>
                </button>
                <button id="pause-btn" class="p-2 hover:bg-white/10 rounded-full transition-colors">
                    <svg id="play-icon" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><polygon points="5 3 19 12 5 21 5 3"/></svg>
                </button>
                <button id="reset-btn" class="p-2 hover:bg-white/10 rounded-full transition-colors">
                    <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M3 12a9 9 0 1 0 9-9 9.75 9.75 0 0 0-6.74 2.74L3 8"/><path d="M3 3v5h5"/></svg>
                </button>
            </div>
        </div>
    </header>
    <main class="max-w-7xl mx-auto p-6 grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-[1fr_320px] gap-8 flex-grow">
        <!-- Game Area -->
        <div class="relative flex flex-col items-center">
            <div class="relative group">
                <canvas id="game-canvas" class="bg-[#111] rounded-xl border border-white/10 shadow-2xl cursor-crosshair"></canvas>
                
                <!-- Game Over Overlay -->
                <div id="game-over-overlay" class="hidden absolute inset-0 bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-xl flex flex-col items-center justify-center z-40">
                    <h2 class="text-4xl font-black uppercase italic tracking-tighter mb-2 text-red-500">System Failure</h2>
                    <p id="final-wave-text" class="text-white/60 mb-4">Wave 0 reached.</p>
                    
                    <div id="high-score-form" class="hidden flex flex-col items-center gap-4 mb-8">
                        <p class="text-yellow-400 font-bold animate-pulse">NEW HIGH SCORE!</p>
                        <input type="text" id="player-name" placeholder="Enter Name" class="bg-white/10 border border-white/20 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-center outline-none focus:border-green-500 transition-colors">
                        <button id="save-score-btn" class="px-6 py-2 bg-green-500 text-black font-bold rounded-lg hover:bg-green-400 transition-colors">SAVE RECORD</button>
                    </div>
                    <button id="restart-btn" class="px-8 py-3 bg-white text-black font-bold rounded-full hover:scale-105 transition-transform flex items-center gap-2">
                        REBOOT SYSTEM
                    </button>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="mt-8 w-full flex items-center justify-between bg-white/5 p-4 rounded-2xl border border-white/10">
                <div class="flex items-center gap-4">
                    <div class="p-3 bg-white/10 rounded-xl">
                        <svg class="w-5 h-5 text-blue-400" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><path d="M12 16v-4"/><path d="M12 8h.01"/></svg>
                    </div>
                    <div>
                        <p class="text-sm font-medium">Mazing Strategy</p>
                        <p class="text-xs text-white/40">Towers act as walls. Force enemies into long paths.</p>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <button id="next-wave-btn" class="px-6 py-3 bg-green-500 text-black font-bold rounded-xl hover:bg-green-400 transition-all flex items-center gap-2 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(34,197,94,0.2)]">
                    NEXT WAVE
                    <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="m9 18 6-6-6-6"/></svg>
                </button>
            </div>
        </div>
        <!-- Sidebar -->
        <aside class="space-y-6">
            <!-- High Scores -->
            <div class="bg-white/5 rounded-2xl border border-white/10 p-6">
                <h3 class="text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-white/40 mb-4 flex items-center gap-2">
                    <svg class="w-4 h-4" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M6 9H4.5a2.5 2.5 0 0 1 0-5H6"/><path d="M18 9h1.5a2.5 2.5 0 0 0 0-5H18"/><path d="M4 22h16"/><path d="M10 14.66V17c0 .55-.47.98-.97 1.21C7.85 18.75 7 20.24 7 22"/><path d="M14 14.66V17c0 .55.47.98.97 1.21C16.15 18.75 17 20.24 17 22"/><path d="M18 2H6v7a6 6 0 0 0 12 0V2Z"/></svg>
                    Hall of Fame
                </h3>
                <div id="leaderboard" class="space-y-2 text-sm">
                    <!-- Leaderboard entries -->
                    <p class="text-white/20 italic text-xs">No records yet...</p>
                </div>
            </div>
            <!-- Map Selection -->
            <div class="bg-white/5 rounded-2xl border border-white/10 p-6">
                <h3 class="text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-white/40 mb-4 flex items-center gap-2">
                    <svg class="w-4 h-4" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><polygon points="3 6 9 3 15 6 21 3 21 18 15 21 9 18 3 21 3 6"/><line x1="9" y1="3" x2="9" y2="18"/><line x1="15" y1="6" x2="15" y2="21"/></svg>
                    Select Sector
                </h3>
                <div id="map-selector" class="grid grid-cols-1 gap-2">
                    <button data-map="CLASSIC" class="map-btn p-3 rounded-xl border text-xs font-bold transition-all bg-white/10 border-white/30 text-white">Classic 20x20</button>
                    <button data-map="FIELDRUNNER" class="map-btn p-3 rounded-xl border text-xs font-bold transition-all bg-transparent border-white/5 text-white/40 hover:border-white/20">Fieldrunner 24x16</button>
                    <button data-map="ELITE" class="map-btn p-3 rounded-xl border text-xs font-bold transition-all bg-transparent border-white/5 text-white/40 hover:border-white/20">Elite 32x32</button>
                </div>
            </div>
            <!-- Tower Arsenal -->
            <div class="bg-white/5 rounded-2xl border border-white/10 p-6">
                <h3 class="text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-white/40 mb-6 flex items-center gap-2">
                    <svg class="w-4 h-4" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M12 22s8-4 8-10V5l-8-3-8 3v7c0 6 8 10 8 10"/></svg>
                    Tower Arsenal
                </h3>
                <div id="tower-selector" class="space-y-3">
                    <button data-type="BASIC" class="tower-btn w-full p-4 rounded-xl border transition-all text-left bg-white/10 border-white/30 shadow-lg">
                        <div class="flex items-center justify-between">
                            <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
                                <div class="w-8 h-8 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center bg-green-500/20">
                                    <svg class="w-4 h-4 text-green-400" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><line x1="22" y1="12" x2="18" y2="12"/><line x1="6" y1="12" x2="2" y2="12"/><line x1="12" y1="6" x2="12" y2="2"/><line x1="12" y1="22" x2="12" y2="18"/></svg>
                                </div>
                                <div><p class="font-bold text-sm">Basic</p><p class="text-[10px] text-white/40 uppercase">Cost: 10</p></div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </button>
                    <button data-type="SNIPER" class="tower-btn w-full p-4 rounded-xl border transition-all text-left bg-transparent border-white/5 hover:border-white/20">
                        <div class="flex items-center justify-between">
                            <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
                                <div class="w-8 h-8 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center bg-blue-500/20">
                                    <svg class="w-4 h-4 text-blue-400" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="3"/><line x1="3" y1="12" x2="21" y2="12"/><line x1="12" y1="3" x2="12" y2="21"/></svg>
                                </div>
                                <div><p class="font-bold text-sm">Sniper</p><p class="text-[10px] text-white/40 uppercase">Cost: 25</p></div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </button>
                    <button data-type="SPLASH" class="tower-btn w-full p-4 rounded-xl border transition-all text-left bg-transparent border-white/5 hover:border-white/20">
                        <div class="flex items-center justify-between">
                            <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
                                <div class="w-8 h-8 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center bg-pink-500/20">
                                    <svg class="w-4 h-4 text-pink-400" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M13 2L3 14h9l-1 8 10-12h-9l1-8z"/></svg>
                                </div>
                                <div><p class="font-bold text-sm">Splash</p><p class="text-[10px] text-white/40 uppercase">Cost: 40</p></div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </aside>
    </main>
    <script>
        // --- Game Engine ---
        const MAPS = {
            CLASSIC: { id: 'CLASSIC', name: 'Classic 20x20', width: 20, height: 20, cellSize: 30, start: { x: 0, y: 9 }, end: { x: 19, y: 9 } },
            FIELDRUNNER: { id: 'FIELDRUNNER', name: 'Fieldrunner 24x16', width: 24, height: 16, cellSize: 28, start: { x: 0, y: 7 }, end: { x: 23, y: 7 } },
            ELITE: { id: 'ELITE', name: 'Elite 32x32', width: 32, height: 32, cellSize: 20, start: { x: 0, y: 15 }, end: { x: 31, y: 15 } }
        };
        const TOWER_DATA = {
            BASIC: { cost: 10, range: 3, damage: 10, fireRate: 1000, color: '#4ade80', spriteUrl: null },
            SNIPER: { cost: 25, range: 7, damage: 40, fireRate: 2500, color: '#60a5fa', spriteUrl: null },
            SPLASH: { cost: 40, range: 2.5, damage: 15, fireRate: 1500, color: '#f472b6', spriteUrl: null }
        };
        // Preload tower images if any
        const towerImages = {};
        Object.keys(TOWER_DATA).forEach(type => {
            if (TOWER_DATA[type].spriteUrl) {
                const img = new Image();
                img.src = TOWER_DATA[type].spriteUrl;
                towerImages[type] = img;
            }
        });
        // --- Particle System ---
        class Particle {
            constructor(x, y, color, speed, angle, life, size) {
                this.x = x; this.y = y; this.color = color;
                this.vx = Math.cos(angle) * speed;
                this.vy = Math.sin(angle) * speed;
                this.life = life; this.maxLife = life;
                this.size = size;
            }
            update() {
                this.x += this.vx; this.y += this.vy;
                this.life--;
                this.vx *= 0.95; this.vy *= 0.95; // Friction
            }
            draw(ctx) {
                const alpha = this.life / this.maxLife;
                ctx.globalAlpha = alpha;
                ctx.fillStyle = this.color;
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.arc(this.x, this.y, this.size * alpha, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                ctx.fill();
                ctx.globalAlpha = 1;
            }
        }
        // --- A* Algorithm ---
        class Node {
            constructor(x, y) {
                this.x = x; this.y = y;
                this.f = 0; this.g = 0; this.h = 0;
                this.parent = null;
            }
        }
        function aStar(start, end, grid, w, h) {
            const openList = [];
            const closedList = Array.from({ length: h }, () => Array(w).fill(false));
            const isInside = (x, y) => x >= 0 && x < w && y >= 0 && y < h;
            openList.push(new Node(start.x, start.y));
            while (openList.length > 0) {
                let lowIdx = 0;
                for (let i = 0; i < openList.length; i++) if (openList[i].f < openList[lowIdx].f) lowIdx = i;
                const current = openList[lowIdx];
                if (current.x === end.x && current.y === end.y) {
                    let curr = current;
                    const path = [];
                    while (curr.parent) { path.push({ x: curr.x, y: curr.y }); curr = curr.parent; }
                    return path.reverse();
                }
                openList.splice(lowIdx, 1);
                closedList[current.y][current.x] = true;
                const neighbors = [{x:0,y:-1},{x:0,y:1},{x:-1,y:0},{x:1,y:0}];
                for (const n of neighbors) {
                    const nx = current.x + n.x, ny = current.y + n.y;
                    if (!isInside(nx, ny) || grid[ny][nx] || closedList[ny][nx]) continue;
                    const gScore = current.g + 1;
                    let best = false;
                    let nNode = openList.find(node => node.x === nx && node.y === ny);
                    if (!nNode) {
                        best = true;
                        nNode = new Node(nx, ny);
                        nNode.h = Math.abs(nx - end.x) + Math.abs(ny - end.y);
                        openList.push(nNode);
                    } else if (gScore < nNode.g) best = true;
                    if (best) {
                        nNode.parent = current;
                        nNode.g = gScore;
                        nNode.f = nNode.g + nNode.h;
                    }
                }
            }
            return null;
        }
        // --- Game State ---
        let currentMap = MAPS.CLASSIC;
        let grid = [];
        let towers = [];
        let enemies = [];
        let projectiles = [];
        let particles = [];
        let money = 100;
        let lives = 20;
        let wave = 0;
        let isPaused = true;
        let selectedTowerType = 'BASIC';
        let currentPath = [];
        let gameOver = false;
        let enemyIdCounter = 0;
        let lastTime = 0;
        const canvas = document.getElementById('game-canvas');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        // --- Effects Helpers ---
        function createExplosion(x, y, color, count = 10, size = 3) {
            for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                particles.push(new Particle(x, y, color, Math.random() * 3 + 1, Math.random() * Math.PI * 2, 30 + Math.random() * 20, Math.random() * size + 1));
            }
        }
        function createMuzzleFlash(x, y, color) {
            createExplosion(x, y, '#fff', 5, 2);
            createExplosion(x, y, color, 3, 1);
        }
        // --- UI Elements ---
        const moneyDisplay = document.getElementById('money-display');
        const livesDisplay = document.getElementById('lives-display');
        const waveDisplay = document.getElementById('wave-display');
        const leaderboardEl = document.getElementById('leaderboard');
        const gameOverOverlay = document.getElementById('game-over-overlay');
        const highScoreForm = document.getElementById('high-score-form');
        // --- Functions ---
        function initMap(map) {
            currentMap = map;
            grid = Array.from({ length: map.height }, () => Array(map.width).fill(false));
            towers = []; enemies = []; projectiles = []; particles = [];
            money = 100; lives = 20; wave = 0;
            isPaused = true; gameOver = false;
            enemyIdCounter = 0;
            
            canvas.width = map.width * map.cellSize;
            canvas.height = map.height * map.cellSize;
            
            updatePath();
            updateUI();
            gameOverOverlay.classList.add('hidden');
            highScoreForm.classList.add('hidden');
            document.getElementById('play-icon').innerHTML = '<polygon points="5 3 19 12 5 21 5 3"/>';
            render();
        }
        function updatePath() {
            const path = aStar(currentMap.start, currentMap.end, grid, currentMap.width, currentMap.height);
            if (path) currentPath = path;
            return path;
        }
        function updateUI() {
            moneyDisplay.innerText = money;
            livesDisplay.innerText = lives;
            waveDisplay.innerText = `WAVE ${wave}`;
        }
        function placeTower(x, y) {
            if (gameOver || isPaused) return;
            if ((x === currentMap.start.x && y === currentMap.start.y) || (x === currentMap.end.x && y === currentMap.end.y)) return;
            if (grid[y][x]) return;
            const cost = TOWER_DATA[selectedTowerType].cost;
            if (money < cost) return;
            grid[y][x] = true;
            const path = updatePath();
            if (!path) { grid[y][x] = false; return; }
            towers.push({ x, y, type: selectedTowerType, lastShot: 0 });
            money -= cost;
            updateUI();
            
            // Effect
            createExplosion((x+0.5)*currentMap.cellSize, (y+0.5)*currentMap.cellSize, '#fff', 15, 2);
            
            // Re-path enemies
            enemies.forEach(e => {
                const ex = Math.floor(e.x), ey = Math.floor(e.y);
                const safeEx = Math.max(0, Math.min(currentMap.width - 1, ex));
                const safeEy = Math.max(0, Math.min(currentMap.height - 1, ey));
                const newP = aStar({ x: safeEx, y: safeEy }, currentMap.end, grid, currentMap.width, currentMap.height);
                if (newP) { e.path = newP; e.pathIndex = 0; }
            });
        }
        function startWave() {
            if (gameOver) return;
            wave++;
            isPaused = false;
            updateUI();
            document.getElementById('play-icon').innerHTML = '<rect x="6" y="4" width="4" height="16"/><rect x="14" y="4" width="4" height="16"/>';
            
            const count = 5 + wave * 2;
            const health = 20 + wave * 15;
            const speed = 0.02 + Math.min(wave * 0.005, 0.05);
            for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                setTimeout(() => {
                    if (gameOver) return;
                    enemies.push({
                        id: enemyIdCounter++,
                        x: currentMap.start.x - 1, y: currentMap.start.y,
                        health, maxHealth: health, speed,
                        pathIndex: 0, path: currentPath, reward: 5 + Math.floor(wave / 2)
                    });
                }, i * 800);
            }
        }
        function gameLoop(time) {
            if (!isPaused && !gameOver) {
                const dt = time - lastTime;
                
                // Particles
                particles = particles.filter(p => {
                    p.update();
                    return p.life > 0;
                });
                // Enemies
                enemies = enemies.filter(e => {
                    if (e.x < 0) { e.x += e.speed; return true; }
                    if (e.pathIndex >= e.path.length) {
                        if (e.x < currentMap.width) { e.x += e.speed; return true; }
                        lives--; updateUI();
                        if (lives <= 0) triggerGameOver();
                        return false;
                    }
                    const target = e.path[e.pathIndex];
                    const dx = target.x - e.x, dy = target.y - e.y;
                    const dist = Math.sqrt(dx*dx + dy*dy);
                    if (dist < e.speed) { e.x = target.x; e.y = target.y; e.pathIndex++; }
                    else { e.x += (dx/dist)*e.speed; e.y += (dy/dist)*e.speed; }
                    return e.health > 0;
                });
                // Towers
                towers.forEach(t => {
                    const data = TOWER_DATA[t.type];
                    if (time - t.lastShot > data.fireRate) {
                        const target = enemies.find(e => Math.sqrt(Math.pow(e.x-t.x,2)+Math.pow(e.y-t.y,2)) <= data.range);
                        if (target) {
                            t.lastShot = time;
                            projectiles.push({ x: t.x+0.5, y: t.y+0.5, targetId: target.id, speed: 0.3, damage: data.damage, type: t.type });
                            createMuzzleFlash((t.x+0.5)*currentMap.cellSize, (t.y+0.5)*currentMap.cellSize, data.color);
                        }
                    }
                });
                // Projectiles
                projectiles = projectiles.filter(p => {
                    const target = enemies.find(e => e.id === p.targetId);
                    if (!target) return false;
                    const dx = target.x+0.5 - p.x, dy = target.y+0.5 - p.y;
                    const dist = Math.sqrt(dx*dx + dy*dy);
                    
                    // Trail
                    particles.push(new Particle(p.x*currentMap.cellSize, p.y*currentMap.cellSize, '#fbbf24', 0.5, Math.random()*Math.PI*2, 10, 2));
                    if (dist < p.speed * 2) {
                        const hitX = (target.x+0.5)*currentMap.cellSize;
                        const hitY = (target.y+0.5)*currentMap.cellSize;
                        createExplosion(hitX, hitY, '#fbbf24', 5, 2);
                        if (p.type === 'SPLASH') {
                            createExplosion(hitX, hitY, '#f472b6', 20, 4);
                            enemies.forEach(e => {
                                if (Math.sqrt(Math.pow(e.x-target.x,2)+Math.pow(e.y-target.y,2)) < 1.5) {
                                    e.health -= p.damage; 
                                    if (e.health <= 0 && e.health + p.damage > 0) {
                                        money += e.reward;
                                        createExplosion((e.x+0.5)*currentMap.cellSize, (e.y+0.5)*currentMap.cellSize, '#ef4444', 15, 3);
                                    }
                                }
                            });
                        } else {
                            target.health -= p.damage; 
                            if (target.health <= 0 && target.health + p.damage > 0) {
                                money += target.reward;
                                createExplosion(hitX, hitY, '#ef4444', 15, 3);
                            }
                        }
                        updateUI(); return false;
                    }
                    p.x += (dx/dist)*p.speed; p.y += (dy/dist)*p.speed;
                    return true;
                });
            }
            lastTime = time;
            render();
            requestAnimationFrame(gameLoop);
        }
        function render() {
            const cs = currentMap.cellSize;
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            // Grid
            ctx.strokeStyle = '#2d2d2d'; ctx.lineWidth = 0.5;
            for (let i=0; i<=currentMap.width; i++) { ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(i*cs, 0); ctx.lineTo(i*cs, canvas.height); ctx.stroke(); }
            for (let i=0; i<=currentMap.height; i++) { ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(0, i*cs); ctx.lineTo(canvas.width, i*cs); ctx.stroke(); }
            // Path
            ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(74, 222, 128, 0.1)'; ctx.lineWidth = 4; ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(currentMap.start.x*cs+cs/2, currentMap.start.y*cs+cs/2);
            currentPath.forEach(p => ctx.lineTo(p.x*cs+cs/2, p.y*cs+cs/2)); ctx.stroke();
            // Start/End
            ctx.fillStyle = '#4ade80'; ctx.fillRect(currentMap.start.x*cs+2, currentMap.start.y*cs+2, cs-4, cs-4);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#f87171'; ctx.fillRect(currentMap.end.x*cs+2, currentMap.end.y*cs+2, cs-4, cs-4);
            // Towers
            towers.forEach(t => {
                const data = TOWER_DATA[t.type];
                const img = towerImages[t.type];
                
                if (img && img.complete) {
                    ctx.drawImage(img, t.x*cs+2, t.y*cs+2, cs-4, cs-4);
                } else {
                    // Base
                    ctx.fillStyle = '#1a1a1a';
                    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.roundRect(t.x*cs+2, t.y*cs+2, cs-4, cs-4, 4); ctx.fill();
                    ctx.strokeStyle = data.color; ctx.lineWidth = 2; ctx.stroke();
                    
                    // Model (Procedural)
                    ctx.fillStyle = data.color;
                    ctx.beginPath();
                    ctx.arc(t.x*cs+cs/2, t.y*cs+cs/2, cs/4, 0, Math.PI*2);
                    ctx.fill();
                    
                    // Barrel
                    ctx.fillStyle = '#333';
                    ctx.fillRect(t.x*cs+cs/2-2, t.y*cs+2, 4, cs/2);
                }
            });
            // Enemies
            enemies.forEach(e => {
                const x = e.x*cs+cs/2, y = e.y*cs+cs/2;
                ctx.fillStyle = '#ef4444'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(x, y, cs/4, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx.fill();
                const hw = (e.health/e.maxHealth)*(cs*0.8);
                ctx.fillStyle = '#1f2937'; ctx.fillRect(x-(cs*0.4), y-(cs*0.5), cs*0.8, 3);
                ctx.fillStyle = '#4ade80'; ctx.fillRect(x-(cs*0.4), y-(cs*0.5), hw, 3);
            });
            // Projectiles
            projectiles.forEach(p => {
                ctx.fillStyle = '#fbbf24'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(p.x*cs, p.y*cs, 3, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx.fill();
            });
            // Particles
            particles.forEach(p => p.draw(ctx));
        }
        // --- Sprite Generation ---
        async function generateSprites() {
            const apiKey = prompt("AI 타워 이미지를 생성하려면 Gemini API Key를 입력해주세요:");
            if (!apiKey) return;
            const btn = document.getElementById('generate-sprites-btn');
            const icon = document.getElementById('gen-icon');
            icon.classList.add('animate-spin');
            btn.disabled = true;
            try {
                const { GoogleGenAI } = await import("@google/genai");
                const ai = new GoogleGenAI({ apiKey });
                const types = ['BASIC', 'SNIPER', 'SPLASH'];
                const prompts = {
                    BASIC: "Top-down view of a futuristic military green turret tower for a grid-based defense game, clean vector art, isolated on a solid black background, sci-fi style, high detail, 256x256. Xenotactic style.",
                    SNIPER: "Top-down view of a futuristic blue sniper tower with a long thin barrel for a grid-based defense game, clean vector art, isolated on a solid black background, high-tech sci-fi style, 256x256. Xenotactic style.",
                    SPLASH: "Top-down view of a futuristic pink missile launcher tower for a grid-based defense game, clean vector art, isolated on a solid black background, heavy artillery sci-fi style, 256x256. Xenotactic style."
                };
                for (const type of types) {
                    const response = await ai.models.generateContent({
                        model: 'gemini-2.5-flash-image',
                        contents: { parts: [{ text: prompts[type] }] },
                        config: { imageConfig: { aspectRatio: "1:1" } },
                    });
                    for (const part of response.candidates[0].content.parts) {
                        if (part.inlineData) {
                            const dataUrl = `data:image/png;base64,${part.inlineData.data}`;
                            const img = new Image();
                            img.src = dataUrl;
                            towerImages[type] = img;
                            localStorage.setItem(`xenotactic_sprite_${type}`, dataUrl);
                        }
                    }
                }
                alert("AI 타워 이미지가 성공적으로 생성되었습니다!");
            } catch (error) {
                console.error(error);
                alert("이미지 생성 중 오류가 발생했습니다. API 키를 확인해주세요.");
            } finally {
                icon.classList.remove('animate-spin');
                btn.disabled = false;
            }
        }
        document.getElementById('generate-sprites-btn').addEventListener('click', generateSprites);
        // Load cached sprites
        ['BASIC', 'SNIPER', 'SPLASH'].forEach(type => {
            const cached = localStorage.getItem(`xenotactic_sprite_${type}`);
            if (cached) {
                const img = new Image();
                img.src = cached;
                towerImages[type] = img;
            }
        });
        // --- Leaderboard Logic ---
        function triggerGameOver() {
            gameOver = true;
            gameOverOverlay.classList.remove('hidden');
            document.getElementById('final-wave-text').innerText = `Wave ${wave} reached.`;
            
            const scores = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('xenotactic_scores') || '[]');
            const minScore = scores.length < 5 ? 0 : Math.min(...scores.map(s => s.wave));
            
            if (wave > minScore) {
                highScoreForm.classList.remove('hidden');
            }
        }
        function saveScore() {
            const name = document.getElementById('player-name').value || 'Anonymous';
            let scores = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('xenotactic_scores') || '[]');
            scores.push({ name, wave, date: new Date().toLocaleDateString() });
            scores.sort((a, b) => b.wave - a.wave);
            scores = scores.slice(0, 5);
            localStorage.setItem('xenotactic_scores', JSON.stringify(scores));
            highScoreForm.classList.add('hidden');
            loadLeaderboard();
        }
        function loadLeaderboard() {
            const scores = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('xenotactic_scores') || '[]');
            if (scores.length === 0) {
                leaderboardEl.innerHTML = '<p class="text-white/20 italic text-xs">No records yet...</p>';
                return;
            }
            leaderboardEl.innerHTML = scores.map((s, i) => `
                <div class="flex justify-between items-center p-2 bg-white/5 rounded-lg">
                    <div class="flex items-center gap-2">
                        <span class="text-white/40 font-mono text-[10px]">0${i+1}</span>
                        <span class="font-bold">${s.name}</span>
                    </div>
                    <span class="text-green-400 font-mono font-bold">W${s.wave}</span>
                </div>
            `).join('');
        }
        // --- Event Listeners ---
        canvas.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
            const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
            const x = Math.floor((e.clientX - rect.left) / currentMap.cellSize);
            const y = Math.floor((e.clientY - rect.top) / currentMap.cellSize);
            placeTower(x, y);
        });
        document.getElementById('next-wave-btn').addEventListener('click', startWave);
        document.getElementById('pause-btn').addEventListener('click', () => {
            isPaused = !isPaused;
            document.getElementById('play-icon').innerHTML = isPaused 
                ? '<polygon points="5 3 19 12 5 21 5 3"/>' 
                : '<rect x="6" y="4" width="4" height="16"/><rect x="14" y="4" width="4" height="16"/>';
        });
        document.getElementById('reset-btn').addEventListener('click', () => initMap(currentMap));
        document.getElementById('restart-btn').addEventListener('click', () => initMap(currentMap));
        document.getElementById('save-score-btn').addEventListener('click', saveScore);
        document.querySelectorAll('.map-btn').forEach(btn => {
            btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
                document.querySelectorAll('.map-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.replace('bg-white/10', 'bg-transparent'));
                document.querySelectorAll('.map-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.replace('border-white/30', 'border-white/5'));
                btn.classList.replace('bg-transparent', 'bg-white/10');
                btn.classList.replace('border-white/5', 'border-white/30');
                initMap(MAPS[btn.dataset.map]);
            });
        });
        document.querySelectorAll('.tower-btn').forEach(btn => {
            btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
                document.querySelectorAll('.tower-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.replace('bg-white/10', 'bg-transparent'));
                btn.classList.replace('bg-transparent', 'bg-white/10');
                selectedTowerType = btn.dataset.type;
            });
        });
        // --- Start ---
        initMap(MAPS.CLASSIC);
        loadLeaderboard();
        requestAnimationFrame(gameLoop);
    </script>
</body>
</html>
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="ko">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Xenotactic Grid Defense - Standalone</title>
    <script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>
    <script type="importmap">
      {
        "imports": {
          "@google/genai": "https://esm.run/@google/genai"
        }
      }
    </script>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;700;900&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <style>
        body { font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; background-color: #0a0a0a; color: white; overflow-x: hidden; }
        .font-mono { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; }
        canvas { image-rendering: pixelated; }
        .glass { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05); backdrop-filter: blur(10px); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); }
        .neon-green { box-shadow: 0 0 15px rgba(74, 222, 128, 0.4); }
        @keyframes pulse-red { 0%, 100% { opacity: 1; } 50% { opacity: 0.5; } }
        .animate-pulse-red { animation: pulse-red 2s infinite; }
    </style>
</head>
<body class="min-h-screen flex flex-col">
    <!-- Header -->
    <header class="border-b border-white/10 bg-black/50 backdrop-blur-md sticky top-0 z-50">
        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 h-16 flex items-center justify-between">
            <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
                <div class="w-10 h-10 bg-green-500 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(34,197,94,0.3)]">
                    <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="black" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M12 22s8-4 8-10V5l-8-3-8 3v7c0 6 8 10 8 10"/></svg>
                </div>
                <div>
                    <h1 class="text-lg font-bold tracking-tight uppercase italic">Xenotactic</h1>
                    <p class="text-[10px] text-white/40 uppercase tracking-[0.2em] -mt-1">Standalone Protocol</p>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="flex items-center gap-8">
                <div class="flex items-center gap-2">
                    <svg class="w-4 h-4 text-yellow-400" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="8" cy="8" r="6"/><path d="M18.09 10.37A6 6 0 1 1 10.34 18.06"/><path d="M7 6h1v4"/><path d="m16.71 13.88.7.71-2.82 2.82"/></svg>
                    <span id="money-display" class="font-mono text-xl font-bold tracking-tighter">100</span>
                </div>
                <div class="flex items-center gap-2">
                    <svg class="w-4 h-4 text-red-500" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="9" cy="12" r="1"/><circle cx="15" cy="12" r="1"/><path d="M8 20a6 6 0 0 1 8 0"/><path d="m15 18-.7.7"/><path d="M6 15h12"/><path d="M13 12v.01"/><path d="M11 12v.01"/></svg>
                    <span id="lives-display" class="font-mono text-xl font-bold tracking-tighter">20</span>
                </div>
                <div class="flex items-center gap-2">
                    <svg class="w-4 h-4 text-blue-400" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="m13 2-2 2.5h3L12 7"/><path d="M11 14h6"/><path d="M11 18h6"/><path d="M15 6h1a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v11a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H8a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V8a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h1"/></svg>
                    <span id="wave-display" class="font-mono text-xl font-bold tracking-tighter">WAVE 0</span>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
                <button id="generate-sprites-btn" class="flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 rounded-xl bg-blue-500/10 hover:bg-blue-500/20 border border-blue-500/20 transition-all text-blue-400 group" title="AI를 사용하여 타워 이미지를 생성합니다">
                    <svg id="gen-icon" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform"><rect width="18" height="18" x="3" y="3" rx="2" ry="2"/><circle cx="9" cy="9" r="2"/><path d="m21 15-3.086-3.086a2 2 0 0 0-2.828 0L6 21"/></svg>
                    <div class="text-left hidden sm:block">
                        <p class="text-[9px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider opacity-60 leading-none">AI Generator</p>
                        <p class="text-xs font-bold text-white/90">AI 타워 생성</p>
                    </div>
                </button>
                <button id="pause-btn" class="p-2 hover:bg-white/10 rounded-full transition-colors">
                    <svg id="play-icon" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><polygon points="5 3 19 12 5 21 5 3"/></svg>
                </button>
                <button id="reset-btn" class="p-2 hover:bg-white/10 rounded-full transition-colors">
                    <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M3 12a9 9 0 1 0 9-9 9.75 9.75 0 0 0-6.74 2.74L3 8"/><path d="M3 3v5h5"/></svg>
                </button>
            </div>
        </div>
    </header>
    <main class="max-w-7xl mx-auto p-6 grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-[1fr_320px] gap-8 flex-grow">
        <!-- Game Area -->
        <div class="relative flex flex-col items-center">
            <div class="relative group">
                <canvas id="game-canvas" class="bg-[#111] rounded-xl border border-white/10 shadow-2xl cursor-crosshair"></canvas>
                
                <!-- Game Over Overlay -->
                <div id="game-over-overlay" class="hidden absolute inset-0 bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-xl flex flex-col items-center justify-center z-40">
                    <h2 class="text-4xl font-black uppercase italic tracking-tighter mb-2 text-red-500">System Failure</h2>
                    <p id="final-wave-text" class="text-white/60 mb-4">Wave 0 reached.</p>
                    
                    <div id="high-score-form" class="hidden flex flex-col items-center gap-4 mb-8">
                        <p class="text-yellow-400 font-bold animate-pulse">NEW HIGH SCORE!</p>
                        <input type="text" id="player-name" placeholder="Enter Name" class="bg-white/10 border border-white/20 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-center outline-none focus:border-green-500 transition-colors">
                        <button id="save-score-btn" class="px-6 py-2 bg-green-500 text-black font-bold rounded-lg hover:bg-green-400 transition-colors">SAVE RECORD</button>
                    </div>
                    <button id="restart-btn" class="px-8 py-3 bg-white text-black font-bold rounded-full hover:scale-105 transition-transform flex items-center gap-2">
                        REBOOT SYSTEM
                    </button>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="mt-8 w-full flex items-center justify-between bg-white/5 p-4 rounded-2xl border border-white/10">
                <div class="flex items-center gap-4">
                    <div class="p-3 bg-white/10 rounded-xl">
                        <svg class="w-5 h-5 text-blue-400" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><path d="M12 16v-4"/><path d="M12 8h.01"/></svg>
                    </div>
                    <div>
                        <p class="text-sm font-medium">Mazing Strategy</p>
                        <p class="text-xs text-white/40">Towers act as walls. Force enemies into long paths.</p>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <button id="next-wave-btn" class="px-6 py-3 bg-green-500 text-black font-bold rounded-xl hover:bg-green-400 transition-all flex items-center gap-2 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(34,197,94,0.2)]">
                    NEXT WAVE
                    <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="m9 18 6-6-6-6"/></svg>
                </button>
            </div>
        </div>
        <!-- Sidebar -->
        <aside class="space-y-6">
            <!-- High Scores -->
            <div class="bg-white/5 rounded-2xl border border-white/10 p-6">
                <h3 class="text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-white/40 mb-4 flex items-center gap-2">
                    <svg class="w-4 h-4" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M6 9H4.5a2.5 2.5 0 0 1 0-5H6"/><path d="M18 9h1.5a2.5 2.5 0 0 0 0-5H18"/><path d="M4 22h16"/><path d="M10 14.66V17c0 .55-.47.98-.97 1.21C7.85 18.75 7 20.24 7 22"/><path d="M14 14.66V17c0 .55.47.98.97 1.21C16.15 18.75 17 20.24 17 22"/><path d="M18 2H6v7a6 6 0 0 0 12 0V2Z"/></svg>
                    Hall of Fame
                </h3>
                <div id="leaderboard" class="space-y-2 text-sm">
                    <!-- Leaderboard entries -->
                    <p class="text-white/20 italic text-xs">No records yet...</p>
                </div>
            </div>
            <!-- Map Selection -->
            <div class="bg-white/5 rounded-2xl border border-white/10 p-6">
                <h3 class="text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-white/40 mb-4 flex items-center gap-2">
                    <svg class="w-4 h-4" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><polygon points="3 6 9 3 15 6 21 3 21 18 15 21 9 18 3 21 3 6"/><line x1="9" y1="3" x2="9" y2="18"/><line x1="15" y1="6" x2="15" y2="21"/></svg>
                    Select Sector
                </h3>
                <div id="map-selector" class="grid grid-cols-1 gap-2">
                    <button data-map="CLASSIC" class="map-btn p-3 rounded-xl border text-xs font-bold transition-all bg-white/10 border-white/30 text-white">Classic 20x20</button>
                    <button data-map="FIELDRUNNER" class="map-btn p-3 rounded-xl border text-xs font-bold transition-all bg-transparent border-white/5 text-white/40 hover:border-white/20">Fieldrunner 24x16</button>
                    <button data-map="ELITE" class="map-btn p-3 rounded-xl border text-xs font-bold transition-all bg-transparent border-white/5 text-white/40 hover:border-white/20">Elite 32x32</button>
                </div>
            </div>
            <!-- Tower Arsenal -->
            <div class="bg-white/5 rounded-2xl border border-white/10 p-6">
                <h3 class="text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-white/40 mb-6 flex items-center gap-2">
                    <svg class="w-4 h-4" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M12 22s8-4 8-10V5l-8-3-8 3v7c0 6 8 10 8 10"/></svg>
                    Tower Arsenal
                </h3>
                <div id="tower-selector" class="space-y-3">
                    <button data-type="BASIC" class="tower-btn w-full p-4 rounded-xl border transition-all text-left bg-white/10 border-white/30 shadow-lg">
                        <div class="flex items-center justify-between">
                            <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
                                <div class="w-8 h-8 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center bg-green-500/20">
                                    <svg class="w-4 h-4 text-green-400" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><line x1="22" y1="12" x2="18" y2="12"/><line x1="6" y1="12" x2="2" y2="12"/><line x1="12" y1="6" x2="12" y2="2"/><line x1="12" y1="22" x2="12" y2="18"/></svg>
                                </div>
                                <div><p class="font-bold text-sm">Basic</p><p class="text-[10px] text-white/40 uppercase">Cost: 10</p></div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </button>
                    <button data-type="SNIPER" class="tower-btn w-full p-4 rounded-xl border transition-all text-left bg-transparent border-white/5 hover:border-white/20">
                        <div class="flex items-center justify-between">
                            <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
                                <div class="w-8 h-8 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center bg-blue-500/20">
                                    <svg class="w-4 h-4 text-blue-400" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="3"/><line x1="3" y1="12" x2="21" y2="12"/><line x1="12" y1="3" x2="12" y2="21"/></svg>
                                </div>
                                <div><p class="font-bold text-sm">Sniper</p><p class="text-[10px] text-white/40 uppercase">Cost: 25</p></div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </button>
                    <button data-type="SPLASH" class="tower-btn w-full p-4 rounded-xl border transition-all text-left bg-transparent border-white/5 hover:border-white/20">
                        <div class="flex items-center justify-between">
                            <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
                                <div class="w-8 h-8 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center bg-pink-500/20">
                                    <svg class="w-4 h-4 text-pink-400" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M13 2L3 14h9l-1 8 10-12h-9l1-8z"/></svg>
                                </div>
                                <div><p class="font-bold text-sm">Splash</p><p class="text-[10px] text-white/40 uppercase">Cost: 40</p></div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </button>
                    <button data-type="MACHINE_GUN" class="tower-btn w-full p-4 rounded-xl border transition-all text-left bg-transparent border-white/5 hover:border-white/20">
                        <div class="flex items-center justify-between">
                            <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
                                <div class="w-8 h-8 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center bg-yellow-500/20">
                                    <svg class="w-4 h-4 text-yellow-400" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><rect x="3" y="3" width="18" height="18" rx="2" ry="2"/><line x1="12" y1="3" x2="12" y2="21"/><line x1="3" y1="12" x2="21" y2="12"/></svg>
                                </div>
                                <div><p class="font-bold text-sm">Machine Gun</p><p class="text-[10px] text-white/40 uppercase">Cost: 20</p></div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </button>
                    <button data-type="LASER" class="tower-btn w-full p-4 rounded-xl border transition-all text-left bg-transparent border-white/5 hover:border-white/20">
                        <div class="flex items-center justify-between">
                            <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
                                <div class="w-8 h-8 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center bg-red-500/20">
                                    <svg class="w-4 h-4 text-red-400" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="3"/></svg>
                                </div>
                                <div><p class="font-bold text-sm">Laser</p><p class="text-[10px] text-white/40 uppercase">Cost: 60</p></div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </button>
                    <button data-type="POISON" class="tower-btn w-full p-4 rounded-xl border transition-all text-left bg-transparent border-white/5 hover:border-white/20">
                        <div class="flex items-center justify-between">
                            <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
                                <div class="w-8 h-8 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center bg-purple-500/20">
                                    <svg class="w-4 h-4 text-purple-400" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M9 19c0 1.1.9 2 2 2h2a2 2 0 0 0 2-2M9 19c0-1.1.9-2 2-2h2a2 2 0 0 1 2 2M9 19V9a7 7 0 1 1 14 0v10M12 3v2"/></svg>
                                </div>
                                <div><p class="font-bold text-sm">Poison</p><p class="text-[10px] text-white/40 uppercase">Cost: 35</p></div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </button>
                    <button data-type="ELECTRIC" class="tower-btn w-full p-4 rounded-xl border transition-all text-left bg-transparent border-white/5 hover:border-white/20">
                        <div class="flex items-center justify-between">
                            <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
                                <div class="w-8 h-8 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center bg-cyan-500/20">
                                    <svg class="w-4 h-4 text-cyan-400" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M13 2L3 14h9l-1 8 10-12h-9l1-8z"/></svg>
                                </div>
                                <div><p class="font-bold text-sm">Electric</p><p class="text-[10px] text-white/40 uppercase">Cost: 50</p></div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </button>
                    <button data-type="ROCKET" class="tower-btn w-full p-4 rounded-xl border transition-all text-left bg-transparent border-white/5 hover:border-white/20">
                        <div class="flex items-center justify-between">
                            <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
                                <div class="w-8 h-8 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center bg-orange-500/20">
                                    <svg class="w-4 h-4 text-orange-400" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="m9 18 6-6-6-6"/></svg>
                                </div>
                                <div><p class="font-bold text-sm">Rocket</p><p class="text-[10px] text-white/40 uppercase">Cost: 75</p></div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </aside>
    </main>
    <script>
        // --- Game Engine ---
        const MAPS = {
            CLASSIC: { id: 'CLASSIC', name: 'Classic 20x20', width: 20, height: 20, cellSize: 30, start: { x: 0, y: 9 }, end: { x: 19, y: 9 } },
            FIELDRUNNER: { id: 'FIELDRUNNER', name: 'Fieldrunner 24x16', width: 24, height: 16, cellSize: 28, start: { x: 0, y: 7 }, end: { x: 23, y: 7 } },
            ELITE: { id: 'ELITE', name: 'Elite 32x32', width: 32, height: 32, cellSize: 20, start: { x: 0, y: 15 }, end: { x: 31, y: 15 } }
        };
        const TOWER_DATA = {
            BASIC: { cost: 10, range: 3, damage: 10, fireRate: 1000, color: '#4ade80', spriteUrl: null },
            SNIPER: { cost: 25, range: 7, damage: 40, fireRate: 2500, color: '#60a5fa', spriteUrl: null },
            SPLASH: { cost: 40, range: 2.5, damage: 15, fireRate: 1500, color: '#f472b6', spriteUrl: null },
            MACHINE_GUN: { cost: 20, range: 3.5, damage: 4, fireRate: 150, color: '#fbbf24', spriteUrl: null },
            LASER: { cost: 60, range: 4, damage: 2, fireRate: 50, color: '#ef4444', spriteUrl: null },
            POISON: { cost: 35, range: 3, damage: 5, fireRate: 1200, color: '#a855f7', spriteUrl: null },
            ELECTRIC: { cost: 50, range: 3.5, damage: 12, fireRate: 1000, color: '#06b6d4', spriteUrl: null },
            ROCKET: { cost: 75, range: 6, damage: 50, fireRate: 3000, color: '#f97316', spriteUrl: null }
        };
        // Preload tower images if any
        const towerImages = {};
        Object.keys(TOWER_DATA).forEach(type => {
            if (TOWER_DATA[type].spriteUrl) {
                const img = new Image();
                img.src = TOWER_DATA[type].spriteUrl;
                towerImages[type] = img;
            }
        });
        // --- Particle System ---
        class Particle {
            constructor(x, y, color, speed, angle, life, size) {
                this.x = x; this.y = y; this.color = color;
                this.vx = Math.cos(angle) * speed;
                this.vy = Math.sin(angle) * speed;
                this.life = life; this.maxLife = life;
                this.size = size;
            }
            update() {
                this.x += this.vx; this.y += this.vy;
                this.life--;
                this.vx *= 0.95; this.vy *= 0.95; // Friction
            }
            draw(ctx) {
                const alpha = this.life / this.maxLife;
                ctx.globalAlpha = alpha;
                ctx.fillStyle = this.color;
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.arc(this.x, this.y, this.size * alpha, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                ctx.fill();
                ctx.globalAlpha = 1;
            }
        }
        // --- A* Algorithm ---
        class Node {
            constructor(x, y) {
                this.x = x; this.y = y;
                this.f = 0; this.g = 0; this.h = 0;
                this.parent = null;
            }
        }
        function aStar(start, end, grid, w, h) {
            const openList = [];
            const closedList = Array.from({ length: h }, () => Array(w).fill(false));
            const isInside = (x, y) => x >= 0 && x < w && y >= 0 && y < h;
            openList.push(new Node(start.x, start.y));
            while (openList.length > 0) {
                let lowIdx = 0;
                for (let i = 0; i < openList.length; i++) if (openList[i].f < openList[lowIdx].f) lowIdx = i;
                const current = openList[lowIdx];
                if (current.x === end.x && current.y === end.y) {
                    let curr = current;
                    const path = [];
                    while (curr.parent) { path.push({ x: curr.x, y: curr.y }); curr = curr.parent; }
                    return path.reverse();
                }
                openList.splice(lowIdx, 1);
                closedList[current.y][current.x] = true;
                const neighbors = [{x:0,y:-1},{x:0,y:1},{x:-1,y:0},{x:1,y:0}];
                for (const n of neighbors) {
                    const nx = current.x + n.x, ny = current.y + n.y;
                    if (!isInside(nx, ny) || grid[ny][nx] || closedList[ny][nx]) continue;
                    const gScore = current.g + 1;
                    let best = false;
                    let nNode = openList.find(node => node.x === nx && node.y === ny);
                    if (!nNode) {
                        best = true;
                        nNode = new Node(nx, ny);
                        nNode.h = Math.abs(nx - end.x) + Math.abs(ny - end.y);
                        openList.push(nNode);
                    } else if (gScore < nNode.g) best = true;
                    if (best) {
                        nNode.parent = current;
                        nNode.g = gScore;
                        nNode.f = nNode.g + nNode.h;
                    }
                }
            }
            return null;
        }
        // --- Game State ---
        let currentMap = MAPS.CLASSIC;
        let grid = [];
        let towers = [];
        let enemies = [];
        let projectiles = [];
        let particles = [];
        let money = 100;
        let lives = 20;
        let wave = 0;
        let isPaused = true;
        let selectedTowerType = 'BASIC';
        let currentPath = [];
        let gameOver = false;
        let enemyIdCounter = 0;
        let lastTime = 0;
        const canvas = document.getElementById('game-canvas');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        // --- Effects Helpers ---
        function createExplosion(x, y, color, count = 10, size = 3) {
            for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                particles.push(new Particle(x, y, color, Math.random() * 3 + 1, Math.random() * Math.PI * 2, 30 + Math.random() * 20, Math.random() * size + 1));
            }
        }
        function createMuzzleFlash(x, y, color) {
            createExplosion(x, y, '#fff', 5, 2);
            createExplosion(x, y, color, 3, 1);
        }
        // --- UI Elements ---
        const moneyDisplay = document.getElementById('money-display');
        const livesDisplay = document.getElementById('lives-display');
        const waveDisplay = document.getElementById('wave-display');
        const leaderboardEl = document.getElementById('leaderboard');
        const gameOverOverlay = document.getElementById('game-over-overlay');
        const highScoreForm = document.getElementById('high-score-form');
        // --- Functions ---
        function initMap(map) {
            currentMap = map;
            grid = Array.from({ length: map.height }, () => Array(map.width).fill(false));
            towers = []; enemies = []; projectiles = []; particles = [];
            money = 100; lives = 20; wave = 0;
            isPaused = true; gameOver = false;
            enemyIdCounter = 0;
            
            canvas.width = map.width * map.cellSize;
            canvas.height = map.height * map.cellSize;
            
            updatePath();
            updateUI();
            gameOverOverlay.classList.add('hidden');
            highScoreForm.classList.add('hidden');
            document.getElementById('play-icon').innerHTML = '<polygon points="5 3 19 12 5 21 5 3"/>';
            render();
        }
        function updatePath() {
            const path = aStar(currentMap.start, currentMap.end, grid, currentMap.width, currentMap.height);
            if (path) currentPath = path;
            return path;
        }
        function updateUI() {
            moneyDisplay.innerText = money;
            livesDisplay.innerText = lives;
            waveDisplay.innerText = `WAVE ${wave}`;
        }
        function placeTower(x, y) {
            if (gameOver || isPaused) return;
            if ((x === currentMap.start.x && y === currentMap.start.y) || (x === currentMap.end.x && y === currentMap.end.y)) return;
            if (grid[y][x]) return;
            const cost = TOWER_DATA[selectedTowerType].cost;
            if (money < cost) return;
            grid[y][x] = true;
            const path = updatePath();
            if (!path) { grid[y][x] = false; return; }
            towers.push({ x, y, type: selectedTowerType, lastShot: 0 });
            money -= cost;
            updateUI();
            
            // Effect
            createExplosion((x+0.5)*currentMap.cellSize, (y+0.5)*currentMap.cellSize, '#fff', 15, 2);
            
            // Re-path enemies
            enemies.forEach(e => {
                const ex = Math.floor(e.x), ey = Math.floor(e.y);
                const safeEx = Math.max(0, Math.min(currentMap.width - 1, ex));
                const safeEy = Math.max(0, Math.min(currentMap.height - 1, ey));
                const newP = aStar({ x: safeEx, y: safeEy }, currentMap.end, grid, currentMap.width, currentMap.height);
                if (newP) { e.path = newP; e.pathIndex = 0; }
            });
        }
        function startWave() {
            if (gameOver) return;
            wave++;
            isPaused = false;
            updateUI();
            document.getElementById('play-icon').innerHTML = '<rect x="6" y="4" width="4" height="16"/><rect x="14" y="4" width="4" height="16"/>';
            
            const count = 5 + wave * 2;
            const health = 20 + wave * 15;
            const speed = 0.02 + Math.min(wave * 0.005, 0.05);
            for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                setTimeout(() => {
                    if (gameOver) return;
                    enemies.push({
                        id: enemyIdCounter++,
                        x: currentMap.start.x - 1, y: currentMap.start.y,
                        health, maxHealth: health, speed,
                        pathIndex: 0, path: currentPath, reward: 5 + Math.floor(wave / 2)
                    });
                }, i * 800);
            }
        }
        function gameLoop(time) {
            if (!isPaused && !gameOver) {
                const dt = time - lastTime;
                
                // Particles
                particles = particles.filter(p => {
                    p.update();
                    return p.life > 0;
                });
                // Enemies
                enemies = enemies.filter(e => {
                    if (e.x < 0) { e.x += e.speed; return true; }
                    if (e.pathIndex >= e.path.length) {
                        if (e.x < currentMap.width) { e.x += e.speed; return true; }
                        lives--; updateUI();
                        if (lives <= 0) triggerGameOver();
                        return false;
                    }
                    const target = e.path[e.pathIndex];
                    const dx = target.x - e.x, dy = target.y - e.y;
                    const dist = Math.sqrt(dx*dx + dy*dy);
                    if (dist < e.speed) { e.x = target.x; e.y = target.y; e.pathIndex++; }
                    else { e.x += (dx/dist)*e.speed; e.y += (dy/dist)*e.speed; }
                    return e.health > 0;
                });
                // Towers
                towers.forEach(t => {
                    const data = TOWER_DATA[t.type];
                    if (time - t.lastShot > data.fireRate) {
                        const target = enemies.find(e => Math.sqrt(Math.pow(e.x-t.x,2)+Math.pow(e.y-t.y,2)) <= data.range);
                        if (target) {
                            t.lastShot = time;
                            if (t.type === 'LASER') {
                                target.health -= data.damage;
                                createExplosion((target.x + 0.5) * currentMap.cellSize, (target.y + 0.5) * currentMap.cellSize, data.color, 2, 1);
                            } else if (t.type === 'ELECTRIC') {
                                target.health -= data.damage;
                                createExplosion((target.x + 0.5) * currentMap.cellSize, (target.y + 0.5) * currentMap.cellSize, data.color, 5, 2);
                                enemies.forEach(e => {
                                    if (e.id !== target.id) {
                                        const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(e.x - target.x, 2) + Math.pow(e.y - target.y, 2));
                                        if (dist < 2) {
                                            e.health -= data.damage * 0.5;
                                            createExplosion((e.x + 0.5) * currentMap.cellSize, (e.y + 0.5) * currentMap.cellSize, data.color, 3, 1);
                                        }
                                    }
                                });
                            } else {
                                projectiles.push({
                                    x: t.x + 0.5, y: t.y + 0.5,
                                    targetId: target.id,
                                    speed: t.type === 'SNIPER' ? 0.6 : 0.3,
                                    damage: data.damage,
                                    type: t.type
                                });
                                createMuzzleFlash((t.x + 0.5) * currentMap.cellSize, (t.y + 0.5) * currentMap.cellSize, data.color);
                            }
                        }
                    }
                });
                // Projectiles
                projectiles = projectiles.filter(p => {
                    const target = enemies.find(e => e.id === p.targetId);
                    if (!target) return false;
                    const dx = target.x + 0.5 - p.x, dy = target.y + 0.5 - p.y;
                    const dist = Math.sqrt(dx*dx + dy*dy);
                    
                    // Trail
                    particles.push(new Particle(p.x * currentMap.cellSize, p.y * currentMap.cellSize, '#fbbf24', 0.5, Math.random() * Math.PI * 2, 10, 2));
                    if (dist < p.speed * 2) {
                        const hitX = (target.x + 0.5) * currentMap.cellSize;
                        const hitY = (target.y + 0.5) * currentMap.cellSize;
                        createExplosion(hitX, hitY, TOWER_DATA[p.type].color, 5, 2);
                        if (p.type === 'SPLASH' || p.type === 'ROCKET') {
                            const splashRange = p.type === 'ROCKET' ? 2.5 : 1.5;
                            createExplosion(hitX, hitY, TOWER_DATA[p.type].color, p.type === 'ROCKET' ? 30 : 20, p.type === 'ROCKET' ? 6 : 4);
                            enemies.forEach(e => {
                                const splashDist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(e.x - target.x, 2) + Math.pow(e.y - target.y, 2));
                                if (splashDist < splashRange) {
                                    e.health -= p.damage;
                                    if (p.type === 'POISON') e.speed *= 0.8;
                                    if (e.health <= 0 && e.health + p.damage > 0) {
                                        money += e.reward;
                                        updateUI();
                                        createExplosion((e.x + 0.5) * currentMap.cellSize, (e.y + 0.5) * currentMap.cellSize, '#ef4444', 15, 3);
                                    }
                                }
                            });
                        } else {
                            target.health -= p.damage;
                            if (p.type === 'POISON') target.speed *= 0.7;
                            if (target.health <= 0 && target.health + p.damage > 0) {
                                money += target.reward;
                                updateUI();
                                createExplosion(hitX, hitY, '#ef4444', 15, 3);
                            }
                        }
                        return false;
                    }
                    p.x += (dx/dist)*p.speed; p.y += (dy/dist)*p.speed;
                    return true;
                });
            }
            lastTime = time;
            render();
            requestAnimationFrame(gameLoop);
        }
        function render() {
            const cs = currentMap.cellSize;
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            // Grid
            ctx.strokeStyle = '#2d2d2d'; ctx.lineWidth = 0.5;
            for (let i=0; i<=currentMap.width; i++) { ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(i*cs, 0); ctx.lineTo(i*cs, canvas.height); ctx.stroke(); }
            for (let i=0; i<=currentMap.height; i++) { ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(0, i*cs); ctx.lineTo(canvas.width, i*cs); ctx.stroke(); }
            // Path
            ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(74, 222, 128, 0.1)'; ctx.lineWidth = 4; ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(currentMap.start.x*cs+cs/2, currentMap.start.y*cs+cs/2);
            currentPath.forEach(p => ctx.lineTo(p.x*cs+cs/2, p.y*cs+cs/2)); ctx.stroke();
            // Start/End
            ctx.fillStyle = '#4ade80'; ctx.fillRect(currentMap.start.x*cs+2, currentMap.start.y*cs+2, cs-4, cs-4);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#f87171'; ctx.fillRect(currentMap.end.x*cs+2, currentMap.end.y*cs+2, cs-4, cs-4);
            // Towers
            towers.forEach(t => {
                const data = TOWER_DATA[t.type];
                const cs = currentMap.cellSize;
                // Draw Laser Beam
                if (t.type === 'LASER' && !isPaused) {
                    const target = enemies.find(e => Math.sqrt(Math.pow(e.x - t.x, 2) + Math.pow(e.y - t.y, 2)) <= data.range);
                    if (target) {
                        ctx.strokeStyle = data.color;
                        ctx.lineWidth = 2;
                        ctx.setLineDash([5, 5]);
                        ctx.beginPath();
                        ctx.moveTo(t.x * cs + cs / 2, t.y * cs + cs / 2);
                        ctx.lineTo((target.x + 0.5) * cs, (target.y + 0.5) * cs);
                        ctx.stroke();
                        ctx.setLineDash([]);
                    }
                }
                const img = towerImages[t.type];
                if (img && img.complete) {
                    ctx.drawImage(img, t.x*cs+2, t.y*cs+2, cs-4, cs-4);
                } else {
                    // Base
                    ctx.fillStyle = '#1a1a1a';
                    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.roundRect(t.x*cs+2, t.y*cs+2, cs-4, cs-4, 4); ctx.fill();
                    ctx.strokeStyle = data.color; ctx.lineWidth = 2; ctx.stroke();
                    
                    // Model (Procedural)
                    ctx.fillStyle = data.color;
                    ctx.beginPath();
                    ctx.arc(t.x*cs+cs/2, t.y*cs+cs/2, cs/4, 0, Math.PI*2);
                    ctx.fill();
                    
                    // Barrel
                    ctx.fillStyle = '#333';
                    ctx.fillRect(t.x*cs+cs/2-2, t.y*cs+2, 4, cs/2);
                }
            });
            // Enemies
            enemies.forEach(e => {
                const x = e.x*cs+cs/2, y = e.y*cs+cs/2;
                ctx.fillStyle = '#ef4444'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(x, y, cs/4, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx.fill();
                const hw = (e.health/e.maxHealth)*(cs*0.8);
                ctx.fillStyle = '#1f2937'; ctx.fillRect(x-(cs*0.4), y-(cs*0.5), cs*0.8, 3);
                ctx.fillStyle = '#4ade80'; ctx.fillRect(x-(cs*0.4), y-(cs*0.5), hw, 3);
            });
            // Projectiles
            projectiles.forEach(p => {
                ctx.fillStyle = '#fbbf24'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(p.x*cs, p.y*cs, 3, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx.fill();
            });
            // Particles
            particles.forEach(p => p.draw(ctx));
        }
        // --- Sprite Generation ---
        async function generateSprites() {
            const apiKey = prompt("AI 타워 이미지를 생성하려면 Gemini API Key를 입력해주세요:");
            if (!apiKey) return;
            const btn = document.getElementById('generate-sprites-btn');
            const icon = document.getElementById('gen-icon');
            icon.classList.add('animate-spin');
            btn.disabled = true;
            try {
                const { GoogleGenAI } = await import("@google/genai");
                const ai = new GoogleGenAI({ apiKey });
                const types = ['BASIC', 'SNIPER', 'SPLASH', 'MACHINE_GUN', 'LASER', 'POISON', 'ELECTRIC', 'ROCKET'];
                const prompts = {
                    BASIC: "Top-down view of a futuristic military green turret tower for a grid-based defense game, clean vector art, isolated on a solid black background, sci-fi style, high detail, 256x256. Xenotactic style.",
                    SNIPER: "Top-down view of a futuristic blue sniper tower with a long thin barrel for a grid-based defense game, clean vector art, isolated on a solid black background, high-tech sci-fi style, 256x256. Xenotactic style.",
                    SPLASH: "Top-down view of a futuristic pink missile launcher tower for a grid-based defense game, clean vector art, isolated on a solid black background, heavy artillery sci-fi style, 256x256. Xenotactic style.",
